message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state with T14.2/T14.3 theme work and reservation snapshot progress

Update beads issue metadata to reflect progress on the named theme
palette system (T14.2, T14.3/br-3n86p) and reservation snapshot
integration work. Closed tasks include theme variant validation,
hot-switching correctness, and contrast accessibility checks across
all five built-in palettes (Frankenstein, Solarized Dark, Dracula,
Nord, Gruvbox Dark). Also tracks closure of reservation screen
DB-snapshot integration that replaces the pure event-sourced approach.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
